title: selaginella geniculata
intro: Selaginella geniculata, also known as spiked resurrection fern, is a species of plant in the family Selaginellaceae, which is a type of spore-producing plant. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella geniculata include reducing fever, relieving headaches, and soothing respiratory issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. It can be consumed as a tea or taken in capsule form as herbal preparations, but further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
